name: Beef and Bacon Chili
recipeIngredient: 28 oz Can, whole tomatoes, undrained, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Optional toppings: sour cream, shredded cheddar cheese, chopped onion, chopped cilantro.
1. Cook bacon in a large saucepan over medium-low heat, stirring frequently, until crisp. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside on paper towels.
2. Pour off all but about 1 tablespoon of the drippings from the bacon.
3. In the remaining drippings, brown ground beef with onion and green pepper; drain excess fat.
4. Add reserved bacon and remaining ingredients (except optional toppings) to the saucepan. Mix well.
5. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Ladle chili into bowls, top as desired with optional toppings, and serve with additional picante sauce if desired.
